subcodes.title: Words to Mountfort Mills, spoken around 1909-05-26
subcodes.first_line: These Council Boards are not Houses of Justice. That is a universal affair to be organized in time by all. Now is not the time.
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @spirit and form in the administration, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @review of publications, @growth of the Cause
